race.comment: The well-related SHE'S A BEAUTY (2) (half to 2xG2 winner and 3xG1 placed Barb Raider) is a former Victorian having her first run for the new yard but the form she showed down south was good enough to be competitive in a race of this calibre. Tuned up for this with a recent trial placing and gets the services of Wiggins on board from the inside marble. Plenty to like about her prospects. AMBER AFFAIR (8) just missed the frame over this track and trip when resuming and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Looms as the main danger. VALADORE (11) placed over this course and distance last time out and will be at peak fitness for this. Top-three aspirations. NOTTINGTON PRINCE (1) gets 2kg off from the low draw and may run a race while fresh. ZEMOREYA (3) next in line.
